transcript:
AI: कल कहाँ गए थे? [Where did you go yesterday?]
Human: I went to maal yesterday.
AI: माल? Pronunciation थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया। It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. कल क्या खाया? [Maal? Pronunciation is a bit off. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. What did you eat yesterday?]
Human: I eat पीजा खाया। [I eat pizza.]
AI: पीजा? नहीं, Pizza. और बात कल की है इसलिए eat नहीं ate - I ate pizza. ट्रेन कहाँ से पकड़ते हो? [Peeza? No, Pizza. And since it's about yesterday, not 'eat' but 'ate' - I ate pizza. Where do you catch the train from?]
Human: I pick train from railway estation.
AI: Pick? Pick मतलब उठाना। Train उठाओगे? Catch मतलब पकड़ना। और ईस्टेशन नहीं, Station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Will you lift the train? Catch means to catch. And not 'estation', Station. I catch the train from the railway station.]
Human: ओहो, मेरा pronunciation weak है। [Oh, my pronunciation is weak.]
AI: कोई बात नहीं, AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या? [No problem, did you try the AI Teacher?]
Human: वो महंगा होगा ना? [That must be expensive, right?]
AI: बिल्कुल नहीं, normal English classes से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all, it is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing on MySivi.]
Human: लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.]
AI: रोज़ सिर्फ 15 से 20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है। धीरे-धीरे कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगे। [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will slowly become confident.]
Human: वाओ, कैसे ज्वाइन करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?]
AI: नीचे Install का बटन दबाओ, MySivi app install करो, sign up करो और प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में improvement दिखने लगेगा। ट्रायल सिर्फ ₹1 में 3 दिनों के लिए है। अभी शुरू करो। [Press the Install button below, install the MySivi app, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. The trial is for just ₹1 for 3 days. Start now.]

summary: A split-screen video call shows an AI robot correcting a woman's English pronunciation and grammar errors in real-time. The AI promotes the MySivi app as an affordable, quick daily practice tool. Viewers are urged to install the app for a 3-day trial costing just ₹1.
